jungian_parallels.brahman_atman: Self archetype - unity of individual and collective unconscious
jungian_parallels.maya: Persona and shadow - illusory nature of ego consciousness
jungian_parallels.chakras: Archetypal energetic centers mapping psychic development

jungian_parallels.anatta: Dissolution of ego - recognition of Self beyond personal identity
jungian_parallels.mandala: Symbol of wholeness and individuation process
jungian_parallels.bodhisattva: Archetype of the Wise Old Man/Woman - compassionate guide
jungian_parallels.bardo_states: Transitional archetypal realms in Tibetan psychology

jungian_parallels.tao: The Self - ineffable totality beyond ego
jungian_parallels.wu_wei: Active imagination - effortless engagement with unconscious
jungian_parallels.i_ching: Synchronicity - acausal ordering principle Jung explored extensively

jungian_parallels.junzi: Individuated self - ethical development through conscious integration
jungian_parallels.li: Ritual as container for archetypal energies in social sphere
jungian_parallels.ren: Development of feeling function - relatedness and compassion

jungian_parallels.ahimsa: Integration of shadow - radical acceptance and non-harm
jungian_parallels.anekantavada: Multivalent nature of psyche - holding paradox and complexity

jungian_parallels.kami: Nature spirits as archetypal projections - numina in natural world
jungian_parallels.ritual_purity: Cleansing of persona to access authentic Self

works: Psychology and Religion: West and East
The Secret of the Golden Flower (commentary)
Psychological Commentary on The Tibetan Book of the Dead
Foreword to the I Ching (Wilhelm edition)
Carl_Jung.approach: Archetypal psychology bridging Eastern symbolism with Western depth analysis

eastern_engagements.mandala: Symbol of psychic wholeness appearing cross-culturally
eastern_engagements.yoga: Parallel to individuation process - integration of opposites
eastern_engagements.taoism: Wu wei as model for relating to unconscious
eastern_engagements.buddhism: Studied Zen and Tibetan Buddhism; saw parallels to psychic integration
eastern_engagements.i_ching: Introduced synchronicity through I Ching consultation method

Carl_Jung.contribution: Provided psychological framework for Western understanding of Eastern spiritual practices
Carl_Jung.style: Empirical yet symbolic; treats Eastern texts as maps of psyche

Hermann_Hesse.approach: Fictional narrative embedding Eastern spiritual journeys
Hermann_Hesse.jungian_influence: Underwent Jungian analysis; work reflects individuation themes

Alan_Watts.approach: Conversational lectures translating Zen and Taoism
Alan_Watts.jungian_connection: Frequently referenced Jung's work on Eastern psychology

Aldous_Huxley.approach: Synthesizing mystical traditions into unified metaphysics

D_T_Suzuki.jungian_connection: Corresponded with Jung; influenced Jung's understanding of Zen

works: Zen and the Birds of Appetite
Thomas_Merton.approach: Christian contemplative engaging with Eastern monasticism

Joseph_Campbell.approach: Comparative mythology drawing heavily on Hinduism/Buddhism
Joseph_Campbell.jungian_influence: Explicitly Jungian framework for hero's journey and archetypes

works: Alchemy: An Introduction to the Symbolism and Psychology
Marie_Louise_von_Franz.approach: Jungian analyst exploring Eastern divination and symbolism
Marie_Louise_von_Franz.contribution: Bridge between Jungian psychology and Eastern oracular practices

Henry_David_Thoreau.contribution: Practical application of Bhagavad Gita wisdom

Gary_Snyder.approach: Zen training integrated with ecological awareness

Pema_Chodron.approach: Tibetan Buddhism in psychologically literate prose

Ram_Dass.approach: Hindu bhakti/yoga for experiential Western seekers

Self.description: Totality of psyche beyond ego; goal of individuation

Shadow.description: Repressed or unintegrated aspects; must be confronted

Wise_Old_Man_Woman.description: Guide to deeper wisdom; meaning-making function

Mandala.description: Symbol of psychic wholeness and integration

Individuation.description: Process of becoming whole; integrating conscious and unconscious

Transcendent_Function.description: Reconciliation of opposing psychic tendencies into new synthesis

Alchemy.description: Symbolic transformation process; opus of individuation

metaphysics.jungian_bridge: Collective unconscious as non-dual ground; archetypes as universal patterns transcending subject-object split

ethics.jungian_bridge: Ethical behavior as expression of individuation; integration of shadow prevents projection and harm

epistemology.jungian_bridge: Symbolic knowing bridges rational and intuitive; active imagination as Western equivalent to meditative insight

psychology_spirituality.jungian_bridge: Individuation honors both ego development and transcendence; Self encompasses and relativizes ego

political_philosophy.Confucian_approach: ritual propriety, benevolent governance, social hierarchy
political_philosophy.Taoist_approach: minimal interference, skepticism of institutions, natural order
political_philosophy.Western_social_contract: individual rights, rule of law, democratic participation
